privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_body: Welcome to Kigongoni Gazella Hotel. We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. If you have any questions or concerns about our policy, or our practices with regards to your personal information, please contact us at reservations@kigongonigazella.co.tz.
privacy.s2_intro: We collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when expressing an interest in obtaining information about us or our services, or when booking a room. The personal information that we collect depends on the context of your interactions with us, and may include:
privacy.s2_li1_text: Name, phone number, email address, and physical address.
privacy.s2_li2_text: Dates of stay, special requests, and preferences.
privacy.s3_intro: We use the information we collect or receive:
privacy.s3_li1: To facilitate the booking process and manage your stay.
privacy.s3_li2: To send administrative information to you (e.g., booking confirmations, invoices).
privacy.s3_li3: To respond to your inquiries and offer customer support.
privacy.s3_li4: To improve our website, services, and guest experience.
privacy.s4_body: We only share information with your consent, to comply with laws, to provide you with services, to protect your rights, or to fulfill business obligations. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.s5_body: We have implemented appropriate technical and organizational security measures designed to protect the security of any personal information we process. However, please also remember that we cannot guarantee that the internet itself is 100% secure. Although we will do our best to protect your personal information, transmission of personal information to and from our services is at your own risk.
privacy.s6_intro: If you have questions or comments about this policy, you may email us at:
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1_body: By accessing or using the Kigongoni Gazella Hotel website and booking our services, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you disagree with any part of the terms, then you may not access our services.
terms.s2_li1_text: All bookings are subject to availability. A booking is only confirmed once a confirmation email is sent and the required deposit is received.
terms.s2_li2_text: We accept major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard), Mobile Money (M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, Airtel Money), and cash payments at the reception.
terms.s2_li3_text: All room rates are inclusive of applicable government taxes and levies unless stated otherwise.
terms.s3_li1_text: Check-in time is from 2:00 PM (14:00) onwards. Early check-in is subject to room availability and may incur additional charges.
terms.s3_li2_text: Check-out time is by 10:00 AM. Late check-out must be requested in advance and may be subject to extra fees.
terms.s3_li3_text: All guests must present a valid government-issued ID or passport upon check-in for security purposes.
terms.s4_intro: We understand that plans can change. Our standard cancellation policy is as follows:
terms.s4_li1: Cancellations made 7 days or more prior to the arrival date will receive a full refund.
terms.s4_li2: Cancellations made within 48 hours to 7 days of the arrival date will incur a 50% cancellation fee.
terms.s4_li3: No-shows or cancellations made less than 48 hours before arrival will be charged the full amount of the booking.
terms.s5_li1_text: All our rooms are strictly non-smoking. A cleaning fee will be charged for smoking inside the rooms. Designated smoking areas are available outside.
terms.s5_li2_text: Pets are not allowed on the hotel premises unless specially requested and approved by management in advance.
terms.s5_li3_text: Guests are responsible for any damage or loss caused to hotel property by themselves or their visitors. The hotel reserves the right to charge the guest for such damages before departure.
terms.s6_body: Kigongoni Gazella Hotel shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages resulting from the use of our services, or for the loss, theft, or damage of personal belongings during your stay. Guests are advised to use the safes provided in their rooms.
terms.s7_intro: If you have any questions or concerns about these Terms of Service, please contact us at:
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about your stay at Kigongoni Gazella Hotel.
faq.q1_question: What are the check-in and check-out times?
faq.q1_answer: Our standard check-in time is from 2:00 PM (14:00), and check-out is by 10:00 AM. If you need an early check-in or late check-out, please contact our reception in advance, and we will do our best to accommodate you based on availability.
faq.q2_question: Is breakfast included in the room rate?
faq.q2_answer: Yes, a complimentary full breakfast is included for all our guests. We serve a variety of local and continental options at our restaurant every morning.
faq.q3_question: Do you provide airport transportation or shuttles?
faq.q3_answer: Yes, we offer airport shuttle services to and from the hotel. This service requires prior arrangement and may incur an additional fee. Please email or call us with your flight details to book.
faq.q4_question: How close is the hotel to Lake Manyara and Ngorongoro Crater?
faq.q4_answer: Kigongoni Gazella Hotel is perfectly situated in Mto wa Mbu, making it a very short drive (less than 10 minutes) to the Lake Manyara National Park gate. We are also highly convenient for day trips to the Ngorongoro Conservation Area.
faq.q5_answer: Absolutely! We provide high-speed complimentary Wi-Fi in all rooms and public areas.
faq.q6_question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.q6_answer: We accept major credit/debit cards (Visa, Mastercard), Mobile Money networks (M-Pesa, Airtel Money, Tigo Pesa), and cash payments in Tanzanian Shillings (TZS).
faq.reception_available: Our reception team is available 24/7 to assist you.
